title: ilex perlata
intro: Ilex perlata, also known as Japanese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex perlata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal disorders. Ilex perlata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in herbal remedies for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
